title: pilosella hoppeana subsp. hoppeana
intro: Pilosella hoppeana subsp. hoppeana is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family, specifically a type of dandelion that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high concentration of inulin, a type of prebiotic fiber that can help support digestive health. The health benefits of Pilosella hoppeana subsp. hoppeana include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and aid in the management of gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
